name: stop-until-tests-pass
summary: Block Stop events while the test suite is failing. Forces fix-tests-first discipline.
when_to_use: Repos with a working test script. Skip on greenfield projects with no tests yet.
script:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
[ ! -f package.json ] && { echo '{"decision":"approve"}'; exit 0; }
TS=$(jq -r '.scripts.test // ""' package.json 2>/dev/null)
[ -z "$TS" ] || [ "$TS" = null ] && { echo '{"decision":"approve"}'; exit 0; }
CNT=$(find . \( -name '*.test.ts' -o -name '*.test.js' -o -name '*.spec.ts' -o -name '*.spec.js' \) -not -path '*/node_modules/*' 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
[ "$CNT" -eq 0 ] && { echo '{"decision":"approve"}'; exit 0; }
R=$(timeout 120 npm test --silent 2>&1 || true)
F=$(printf '%s' "$R" | grep -cE 'FAIL |failed|✗|× |Error:|AssertionError' 2>/dev/null || true)
if [ "$F" -gt 0 ]; then
  S=$(printf '%s' "$R" | tail -10)
  jq -n --arg s "$S" '{"decision":"block","reason":("Tests failing — fix first:\n\n"+$s)}'
  exit 0
fi
echo '{"decision":"approve"}'
verify: Introduce a failing test; Stop gets blocked with the failure summary.
